question: Did you lose over $3,500 as a result of a scam?
How much money did you lose as a result of a scam in US Dollars ($)?
What type of scam was it?
description: If you're not sure, then just select 'Other'. Scroll down for options.
options: 'Safe Account' Scam (fake bank, tax office impersonation)

question: Was there a bank involved in any part of the payment process?
description: For example, you sent money from or to a bank account.

question: How did you pay the fraudsters?
description: Please select any of the options below.
options: Bank transfer(s) (branch, app or online banking)
International payment system - like Wise, Moneygram, Western Union
Crypto transfer to a wallet (e.g. Coinbase, Binance, Kraken)

question: Which bank(s) did you send the money from?
Tell us what happened
description: A 1 or 2 sentence summary is fine.

question: When did this happen?
description: This doesn't need to be an exact date, but the more accurate the better.

question: Your phone number
description: Enter your phone number with dailing code. Example USA - +1(203)224-7788
